title: Login required to download ODBC driver
body:
You must now log in to Databricks and accept license terms before downloading the Simba Apache Spark ODBC Driver. See [Download and install the Databricks ODBC Driver](/aws/en/integrations/odbc/download).

If you use Databricks on AWS GovCloud, contact your account team to receive access to the driver.

ref_links.text: Download and install the Databricks ODBC Driver
